$schema-note: All copy for the MCP tutorial picker, greeting, follow-ups, and cross-sells. Edit this file to update prompts without touching TypeScript. Each entry in defaultKit/roleKits carries a stable `key` so framework overrides can target it by name (reorder-safe — see roleFamilyOverrides).

defaultKit.description: Creates a dated note on your project — visible on every chart. Delete anytime from PostHog.

defaultKit.prompt: Show me my top 5 events from the last 7 days
defaultKit.description: Get a feel for what your project is tracking.

defaultKit.prompt: Build me a funnel for my main user journey
defaultKit.description: Insight discovery — your agent picks the events.

defaultKit.prompt: Create a feature flag called new-feature rolled out to 10%
defaultKit.description: Flag CRUD — instant kill switch for your next release.

defaultKit.prompt: Alert me if my error rate spikes above baseline
defaultKit.description: Set up a sensible default alert without leaving your IDE.

founder.description: Creates a dated note on your project — visible on every chart. Delete anytime from PostHog.

founder.prompt: Build me an exec dashboard: MRR, MAU, churn, top events
founder.description: A one-glance view of the business you can pin and share.

founder.prompt: Show me weekly active users for the last 90 days
founder.description: The trendline you actually care about.

founder.prompt: Alert me if MAU drops more than 10% week-over-week
founder.description: Wake-up call if growth stalls — set and forget.

founder.prompt: Run an NPS survey on all paid customers
founder.description: Pulse-check on the people paying you.

product.description: Creates a dated note on your project — visible on every chart. Delete anytime from PostHog.

product.prompt: Build a funnel for my onboarding flow
product.description: See where new users drop off in their first session.

product.prompt: Create a feature flag for the new pricing page rolled out to 25%
product.description: Ship safely — flag CRUD straight from your agent.

product.prompt: A/B test the redesigned upgrade CTA
product.description: Spin up an experiment without leaving your IDE.

product.prompt: Compute week-1 retention split by acquisition channel
product.description: Find the channel that actually retains users.

leadership.description: Creates a dated note on your project — visible on every chart. Delete anytime from PostHog.

leadership.prompt: Build a board dashboard: revenue, MAU, churn, support backlog
Show MAU growth over the last 4 quarters
leadership.description: The chart for the next leadership slide.

leadership.prompt: Alert the leadership channel when churn doubles week-over-week
leadership.description: Slack ping when something needs your attention.

leadership.prompt: Which features drive the most upgrades?
leadership.description: Ranked breakdown of what actually moves the needle.

marketing.description: Creates a dated note on your project — visible on every chart. Delete anytime from PostHog.

marketing.prompt: Cohort of users who saw pricing but didn't sign up
A/B test the landing page hero copy
marketing.description: Run the experiment, get the verdict, no engineering ask.

marketing.prompt: Send an NPS survey to users who clicked our last newsletter
marketing.description: Closed-loop feedback on the campaign that just ran.

marketing.prompt: Annotate today as the launch of the new landing page
marketing.description: Pin the deploy on every chart so future you can find it.

engineering.description: Creates a dated note on your project — visible on every chart. Delete anytime from PostHog.

engineering.prompt: List flags rolled out to 100% — they're probably safe to delete
engineering.description: Dead-code hunt for your feature flag config.

engineering.prompt: Show me the top 5 unresolved errors this week
engineering.description: Triage queue without opening another tab.

engineering.prompt: Page me if 5xx error rate exceeds 1% over 5 minutes
Add a kill-switch flag for the next release rolled out to 0%
engineering.description: Ship safer — one prompt sets up the rollback.

data.description: Creates a dated note on your project — visible on every chart. Delete anytime from PostHog.

data.prompt: Top 5 events by volume in the last 24 hours
data.description: Smoke test for ingestion + a sanity check on volumes.

data.prompt: Retention curve for paid users by signup month
data.description: The cohort chart you'd build first anyway.

data.prompt: Funnel: signup → activated → first power feature → paid
data.description: Drop-off across the full journey, ready to slice.

data.prompt: Cohort of power users — 5+ sessions per week over the last month

cta.prompt: A/B test the redesigned upgrade CTA — variants control / red / green
cta.description: Frontend experiment with three arms, wired to your flag.

onboarding.description: Mobile-flavored onboarding funnel with sensible defaults.

cta.prompt: Create a feature flag gated on app version >= the current release
cta.description: Version-gated rollouts — only new clients see the change.

onboarding.prompt: Funnel of signup → first API call → paid for last 30 days
onboarding.description: Backend funnel that reflects what your service actually sees.

top-errors.prompt: Top 5 JS errors by occurrence count this week, with affected URLs
top-errors.description: Frontend-specific error triage — sorted by blast radius.

top-errors.prompt: Top crashes this week by app version, sorted by affected users
top-errors.description: Mobile crash triage straight from the same data PostHog has.

reliability-alert.prompt: Page me when crash-free sessions drop below 99%
reliability-alert.description: Crash-free SLA alert — the one mobile metric that matters.

top-errors.prompt: Top 5 server-side errors this week, grouped by endpoint
top-errors.description: Backend error triage by route, sorted by frequency.

reliability-alert.prompt: Alert when p95 response time exceeds 500ms over a 5-minute window
reliability-alert.description: Latency SLO alert against the data you already collect.

full-funnel.prompt: Funnel: api_signup → first_api_call → first_paid_event over last 30 days
full-funnel.description: Backend conversion funnel — captures the value your service delivers.

founder.headline: Founders use MCP to keep a hand on growth.
bullets: Weekly active users, retention, and revenue without leaving your IDE.
Alerts when something stalls — set once, forget about it.
Pin annotations on every chart so you remember what shipped.
founder.outro: Pick a prompt — your agent will run it on your project's real data.

product.headline: PMs use MCP to ship faster and learn quicker.
bullets: Funnels for every onboarding flow you want to test.
Feature flags and experiments without a deploy.
Retention sliced by acquisition channel in seconds.
product.outro: Pick a prompt — your agent will do the legwork.

leadership.headline: Run the business from your terminal.
bullets: Board-ready dashboards in one prompt.
Slack alerts when MAU, churn, or revenue drifts.
The numbers for the next leadership slide, on tap.
leadership.outro: Pick a prompt to see PostHog work for you.

marketing.headline: Marketing campaigns, fully instrumented.
bullets: Cohorts of high-intent visitors, ready to retarget.
A/B test landing copy without an engineering ticket.
Tie every campaign to revenue with annotated launches.
marketing.outro: Pick a prompt to try it on your data.

engineering.headline: MCP is your shortest path from bug to fix.
bullets: Top errors this week, sorted by blast radius.
Latency SLOs and crash-free SLAs with one prompt.
Kill-switch flags ready before the next release.
engineering.outro: Pick a prompt — your agent has full read/write access.

data.headline: Data work without leaving the terminal.
bullets: Cohorts in seconds, materialized in your project.
Retention curves by signup month, sliced any way you want.
Run SQL against your event stream — no copy-paste, no exports.
data.outro: Pick a prompt — every result is real data from your project.

neutralGreeting.headline: PostHog MCP turns your agent into a product analyst.
bullets: Run queries, build dashboards, ship flags — straight from your IDE.
Every result is real data from your project.
No copy-pasting tokens, no context switching.
neutralGreeting.outro: Pick a prompt to see what MCP can do.

query-error-tracking-issue.label: Dig into the top issue
query-error-tracking-issue.prompt: Show me the stack trace and recent occurrences for the top error.

query-error-tracking-issue.label: Set up an alert
query-error-tracking-issue.prompt: Page me if that error rate doubles week-over-week.

query-error-tracking-issue.label: Find related events
query-error-tracking-issue.prompt: What events do users trigger right before hitting that error?

query-error-tracking-issue.label: Who is most affected?
query-error-tracking-issue.prompt: Which users have hit that error most often in the last 7 days?

query-error-tracking-issue.label: When did it start?
query-error-tracking-issue.prompt: Show me when that error first appeared and any deploy that landed nearby.

query-error-tracking-issue.label: Suppress the noise
query-error-tracking-issue.prompt: Suppress the noisiest error for now so I can focus.

query-trends.label: Save as dashboard
query-trends.prompt: Save that as a dashboard called "Trends" and pin it.

query-trends.label: Break down by property
query-trends.prompt: Break that down by the most common user property.

query-trends.label: Compare to last week
query-trends.prompt: Compare that against the same period last month.

query-trends.label: Build a funnel from it
query-trends.prompt: Build a funnel using the top events from that trend.

query-trends.label: Find the outlier day
query-trends.prompt: Which day stood out the most and what else was going on?

query-trends.label: Alert me on a drop
query-trends.prompt: Alert me if that metric drops more than 20% week-over-week.

query-funnel.label: Find the biggest drop-off
query-funnel.prompt: Which step has the biggest drop-off, and who falls out there?

query-funnel.label: Cohort the bouncers
query-funnel.prompt: Create a cohort of people who dropped out at the biggest step.

query-funnel.label: Slice by platform
query-funnel.prompt: Show that funnel split by mobile vs desktop.

query-funnel.label: Look at completion time
query-funnel.prompt: How long does it take users who complete that funnel?

query-funnel.label: Compare two cohorts
query-funnel.prompt: Compare that funnel between new signups and users older than 30 days.

query-funnel.label: A/B test a fix
query-funnel.prompt: Set up an experiment to test a change at the biggest drop-off step.

create-feature-flag.label: Roll it out to 25%
create-feature-flag.prompt: Roll that flag out to 25% of users.

create-feature-flag.label: Add a kill-switch
create-feature-flag.prompt: Create a kill-switch flag at 100% so I can disable the feature instantly.

create-feature-flag.label: See who is in
create-feature-flag.prompt: Show me which users are currently in that flag.

create-feature-flag.label: Wrap it in an experiment
create-feature-flag.prompt: Convert that flag into an A/B test with control + variant arms.

create-feature-flag.label: Schedule a ramp
create-feature-flag.prompt: Ramp that flag 10% → 25% → 50% → 100% over the next two weeks.

create-feature-flag.label: Filter to a cohort
create-feature-flag.prompt: Limit that flag rollout to beta users only.

create-dashboard.label: Add another tile
create-dashboard.prompt: Add a tile showing daily active users to that dashboard.

create-dashboard.label: Subscribe to weekly digest
create-dashboard.prompt: Email me a weekly summary of that dashboard.

create-dashboard.label: Share with the team
create-dashboard.prompt: Make that dashboard shareable with the team.

create-dashboard.label: Add a leaderboard tile
create-dashboard.prompt: Add a top-5 users tile to that dashboard.

create-dashboard.label: Annotate today
create-dashboard.prompt: Annotate today on that dashboard as the launch baseline.

create-dashboard.label: Compare to last quarter
create-dashboard.prompt: Add a tile comparing this quarter to the last on the same dashboard.

create-insight.label: Pin it to a dashboard
create-insight.prompt: Pin that insight to my main dashboard.

create-insight.label: Schedule a subscription
create-insight.prompt: Email me that insight every Monday morning.

create-insight.label: Split by user property
create-insight.prompt: Split that insight by the most common user property.

create-insight.label: Alert on a threshold
create-insight.prompt: Alert me when that insight crosses an unusual value.

create-insight.label: Compare to a control
create-insight.prompt: Compare that insight between paid and free users side-by-side.

create-insight.label: Save the underlying query
create-insight.prompt: Save the SQL behind that insight so I can edit it later.

execute-sql.label: Materialize the result
execute-sql.prompt: Save that query as a materialized view I can reuse.

execute-sql.label: Chart it
execute-sql.prompt: Turn that into an insight with a line chart.

execute-sql.label: Slice differently
execute-sql.prompt: Re-run that query grouped by the most common user property.

execute-sql.label: Find the outliers
execute-sql.prompt: Re-run that query and surface the top 5 outliers.

execute-sql.label: Schedule it
execute-sql.prompt: Run that query every morning and post the result to Slack.

execute-sql.label: Add a percentile
execute-sql.prompt: Add p50/p90/p99 to that query's result.

cohorts-create.label: Build a funnel for them
cohorts-create.prompt: Build a funnel showing how that cohort moves through onboarding.

cohorts-create.label: Compare to everyone else
cohorts-create.prompt: How does retention for that cohort compare to all other users?

cohorts-create.label: Run an experiment
cohorts-create.prompt: Run an A/B test limited to that cohort.

cohorts-create.label: Survey them
cohorts-create.prompt: Send an NPS survey to that cohort.

cohorts-create.label: Target a flag
cohorts-create.prompt: Limit a feature flag rollout to just that cohort.

cohorts-create.label: Find a lookalike
cohorts-create.prompt: Find a cohort that behaves like that one but is larger.

survey-create.label: Target a cohort
survey-create.prompt: Only show that survey to active users from the last 7 days.

survey-create.label: Add a follow-up question
survey-create.prompt: Add an open-ended follow-up question to that survey.

survey-create.label: Summarize early responses
survey-create.prompt: Summarize the responses to that survey so far.

survey-create.label: A/B test the wording
survey-create.prompt: Run two variants of that survey question and compare response rate.

founder.label: Pin it to the exec dashboard
founder.prompt: Add that result to my exec dashboard.

founder.label: Alert me if it tanks
founder.prompt: Page me if that metric drops 10% week-over-week.

founder.label: Tie it to revenue
founder.prompt: How does that correlate with paid conversions?

founder.label: Share with investors
founder.prompt: Make a shareable view of that for our next board update.

product.label: Build a funnel around it
product.prompt: Build a funnel that includes that step.

product.label: Wrap in an experiment
product.prompt: Run an A/B test on that change.

product.label: Cohort the high-intent users
product.prompt: Create a cohort of users showing the strongest signal in that result.

product.label: Send a survey
product.prompt: Trigger a short survey to anyone in that cohort.

leadership.label: Add to weekly digest
leadership.prompt: Subscribe me to a weekly email containing that view.

leadership.label: Compare to last quarter
leadership.prompt: How does that compare against the same period last quarter?

leadership.label: Slack the leadership channel
leadership.prompt: Send a Slack alert to leadership if that drifts significantly.

marketing.label: Annotate the launch
marketing.prompt: Annotate today as the campaign launch on that chart.

marketing.label: Retarget the cohort
marketing.prompt: Build a retargetable cohort of users showing that behavior.

marketing.label: Tie back to channel
marketing.prompt: Split that result by acquisition channel.

marketing.label: A/B test the landing
marketing.prompt: Run an A/B test on the landing page driving that traffic.

engineering.label: Surface the regression
engineering.prompt: Did that change land alongside a deploy in the last 24 hours?

engineering.label: Page on the SLO
engineering.prompt: Set up an SLO alert for that metric.

engineering.label: Kill-switch the cause
engineering.prompt: Create a kill-switch flag for the feature most likely to be related.

engineering.label: Group by release
engineering.prompt: Re-run that broken down by app version or release.

data.label: Save as SQL view
data.prompt: Save that query as a reusable SQL view.

data.label: Materialize it
data.prompt: Materialize the underlying table so future queries are faster.

data.label: Add percentiles
data.prompt: Add p50/p90/p99 distributions to that result.

data.label: Export to warehouse
data.prompt: Sync that result to my data warehouse.

genericFollowUps.label: Go one level deeper
genericFollowUps.prompt: Run that same question one level deeper.

genericFollowUps.label: Take a different angle
genericFollowUps.prompt: Look at the same question from a completely different angle.

genericFollowUps.label: Find the surprise
genericFollowUps.prompt: What's the most surprising thing in that result?

genericFollowUps.label: Slice by user
genericFollowUps.prompt: Re-run that split by the highest-value user segment.

genericFollowUps.label: Compare with last month
genericFollowUps.prompt: How does that look compared to the same window a month ago.

genericFollowUps.label: Make it actionable
genericFollowUps.prompt: Turn that into an alert, dashboard, or saved insight.

deepDiveFollowUps.label: Save this exploration
deepDiveFollowUps.prompt: Save the most useful chart from this session as a dashboard I can come back to.

deepDiveFollowUps.label: Set up an alert
deepDiveFollowUps.prompt: Pick the most interesting metric from this session and alert me when it shifts.

deepDiveFollowUps.label: Summarize what we found
deepDiveFollowUps.prompt: Summarize the key findings from everything we just looked at in 3 bullets.

founder.prompt: Find 3 recent sessions where a user looked at pricing but did not sign up.
founder.description: Watch what users see — replay turns funnel drop-offs into video.

founder.prompt: Launch an NPS survey targeting all paying customers.
founder.description: Quantitative pulse check, no Typeform setup.

product.prompt: Set up an A/B test for the new onboarding flow with a 50/50 split and signup as the primary metric.
product.description: Experiments piggyback on flags — same SDK, no extra setup.

product.prompt: Find sessions where users got stuck on the empty state in onboarding.
product.description: See what funnels can't show you.

leadership.prompt: Run a quarterly NPS across all paid users.
leadership.description: Replace Typeform with first-party survey data.

leadership.prompt: Compare MRR by signup source using Stripe data joined with event data.
leadership.description: Sync Stripe / Salesforce / S3 to query revenue alongside events.

marketing.prompt: Watch 5 sessions from users who came via our last campaign and converted.
marketing.description: See campaign visitors behave — beyond aggregate numbers.

marketing.prompt: Show me top traffic sources to the pricing page this week.
marketing.description: GA-style first-party web analytics, no cookie banner.

engineering.prompt: Show me the top 5 errors this week and who is affected.
engineering.description: Built-in error tracking — no Sentry subscription.

engineering.prompt: Replay the last 3 sessions that hit a 5xx error.
engineering.description: Stack trace meets replay — see what the user did.

data.prompt: Join my event stream with Stripe subscriptions to surface churn signals.
data.description: Connect Stripe / Salesforce / S3, query everything with SQL.

data.prompt: Show me the top 5 LLM prompts by cost over the last 7 days.
data.description: Track LLM calls, latency, and cost next to product events.

neutralCrossSell.prompt: Show me 5 recent sessions where users dropped off before completing signup.
neutralCrossSell.description: Replay what users actually do — included on every plan.

neutralCrossSell.prompt: List the top errors my users hit this week.
neutralCrossSell.description: Built-in error tracking — no separate tool.
